name: EUDA Health Holdings Ltd
summary: PART I Overview EUDAs mission is to make high-quality, personalized healthcare affordable and accessible for all its patients. It aims to provide one stop healthcare and wellness services through its proprietary platform, EUDA. EUDA currently has operations in Singapore and has plans to expand across Southeast Asia. Its operations in Singapore includes provision of medical urgent care and property management services. In January 2020, EUDA acquired 100% of the equity interests in Super Gateway G...
